title: 10 Habits That Build a Man in His 20s
caption:
The 20s are where a man gets built — or where he drifts and wonders why his 30s feel hollow.

None of this is complicated. Most of it is just doing the basic thing the basic way, consistently, before the world makes it harder.

Pick three. Do them this week. The man nobody saw coming is just the man who kept doing the ordinary things when everyone else quit.

Save this and send it to a young man you know.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #thework #christianity #habits
theme: He works. He builds. The 20s are where a man gets built.
